name: Code Audit Dry Run
description: Plan a staged code audit with independent inspection, adversarial review, and synthesis.

inputs.name: scope
inputs.description: Repository paths or pull request scope to audit.

phases.description: Inspect the requested code paths for correctness and maintainability risks.
phases.prompt: Read the target code and identify concrete findings with file paths and evidence.

phases.description: Challenge the inspection findings and look for false positives or missed risks.
phases.prompt: Review inspection outputs critically and verify each claim against the code.

phases.description: Synthesize verified audit findings into a concise report.
phases.prompt: Summarize only verified findings with severity, evidence, and suggested fixes.
